subcodes.first_line: The Throne hath been made manifest, and seated thereon is the Temple of God, Lord of the unseen and the seen, and in the first moment of His seating He shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ظهر العرش و استوی علیه هیکل الله مالک الغیب و الشهود و فی اول الجلوس تجلی
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
